# CV

> This file is your canonical CV — the complete, reviewed source of truth for your professional history. All CV tailoring starts from here. Keep it complete and accurate. Tailored versions are written to `opportunities/*/cv-variant.md` — this base file is never modified as a side effect of tailoring.
>
> To populate this file: use the LinkedIn PDF parsing workflow (tell Claude Code "parse my LinkedIn PDF" and attach the export), then review and correct the output carefully. LinkedIn profiles are often outdated or incomplete.

---
